ApiNamedQuery.body2: SELECT CALENDAR_YEAR(CreatedDate) YEAR, CALENDAR_MONTH(CreatedDate) MONTH, EventType, COUNT(Id) FilesCount FROM EventLogFile GROUP BY CALENDAR_YEAR(CreatedDate), CALENDAR_MONTH(CreatedDate), EventType ORDER BY CALENDAR_YEAR(CreatedDate) ASC, CALENDAR_MONTH(CreatedDate) ASC, EventType ASC
ApiNamedQuery.description: Returns the number of Event Log Files in the org aggregated by calendar year, calendar month, and event type, ordered chronologically. Useful for monitoring event-monitoring data availability and volume trends before downloading or ingesting logs.
ApiNamedQuery.masterLabel: Event Log File Counts by Month and Type
